title: SDK Prototype / Packaging Boundary
decision_rationale: The GL-203B cleaned OpenAPI contract (version 0.203b.0-developer-preview) is sufficient for SDK prototype work. A minimal Python stdlib prototype with injectable transport was created at examples/sdk_prototype/python/grantlayer_client.py. The auth model, tenant context model, and error contract are all cleanly representable. No package publishing metadata was created. No official SDK is claimed. Remaining blockers (workspace enforcement, admin-plane isolation, PostgreSQL validation) are server-side and do not block SDK prototype exploration. GL-204 is the required next step before any external pilot.

sdk_feasibility_assessment.openapi_quality: Sufficient for SDK prototype. 36 documented paths, clear public/protected distinction, explicit auth schemes, server-derived tenant context documented, consistent GL-030 error contract, all schemas defined.
sdk_feasibility_assessment.auth_model_clarity: Two bearer token schemes (LegacyAdminToken, OperatorToken) representable as single token parameter. Both use Authorization: Bearer header. Documented in security schemes.
sdk_feasibility_assessment.tenant_context_model: Server-derived from authentication. Client does NOT need to supply or derive tenant_id. No override header needed or supported.
sdk_feasibility_assessment.error_response_clarity: GL-030 additive shape {error, errorCode, reason} consistently documented across all endpoints.
sdk_feasibility_assessment.deterministic_examples: FakeTransport enables deterministic tests without network. Existing examples (grant_lifecycle_evidence_bundle.py) unaffected.
sdk_feasibility_assessment.endpoint_coverage: Health, readiness, grants (CRUD, revoke), audit events, challenges, operator profile, grant requests, grant executions, evidence bundles, agent permissions. 24 named methods covering 30+ endpoint/method combinations.
sdk_readiness_gaps: Stale tenant isolation claim in public docs (GL-203B deferred)

existing_gaps: No injectable transport (network always required for tests)

openapi_dependency_assessment.tenant_context: Server-derived; prototype sends NO tenant override header
openapi_dependency_assessment.openapi_change_reason: None — GL-203B contract is sufficient as-is

endpoint_groups: grant requests (list, get, create, approve, deny)

allowed_now: Internal prototype source file at examples/sdk_prototype/python/
Future GL issue for SDK packaging

token_secret_safety_model.token_transmission: Authorization: Bearer header only, over caller's network
token_secret_safety_model.token_on_public_endpoints: Not sent — auth header skipped when token is None

tenant_workspace_sdk_boundary.tenant_context: Server-derived from authentication — NOT a client-supplied parameter
tenant_workspace_sdk_boundary.workspace_id_status: Reserved/deferred server-side; SDK reflects this by not exposing it

allowed_public_claims: API-first — no SDK required to integrate
No official SDK yet — prototype is experimental
SDK packaging under evaluation for future issue

findings.summary: GL-203B cleaned OpenAPI is sufficient for SDK prototype work — all schemas defined, auth models documented, tenant context model documented
Existing sdk/python/grantlayer_client.py lacks injectable transport and has stale caveats — GL-203C prototype improves both
findings.action: GL-203C prototype coexists with existing SDK; both remain as developer evaluation resources

findings.summary: No package publishing pipeline exists — correct posture for Developer Preview; packaging deferred to GL-203D/GL-205 after GL-204
findings.action: Document as deferred; block on GL-204

findings.summary: workspace_id enforcement deferred — SDK reflects this by not exposing workspace parameters
findings.action: Document as remaining gap; no SDK change needed

findings.summary: sdk/python/README.md still says 'Tenant isolation is not implemented' — inaccurate since GL-200A/B/C
findings.action: Deferred — requires coordinated test changes per GL-203B precedent

remaining_gaps: Stale tenant isolation claim in AGENTS.md, llms.txt, llms-full.txt, README.md, SECURITY.md, sdk/python/README.md (requires coordinated test changes)

production_readiness_impact.current_posture: Developer Preview / Controlled Preview with strict boundaries
production_readiness_impact.sdk_package: Internal prototype created; not published; not official

recommended_next_issues.description: Merge gl-203c-sdk-prototype-packaging-boundary to internal main after validation

Production Ops / Go-No-Go v3 — live PostgreSQL validation, backup/restore minimum drill, observability baseline, go/no-go decision for first external controlled pilot. Required before any external pilot or public SDK release.

recommended_next_issues.condition: Only after GL-204 passes production ops gate
recommended_next_issues.description: Experimental Public SDK / Packaging — design packaging pipeline, semantic versioning, and experimental public release. Do not proceed before GL-204.
